raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "An act of sexual assault is committed every 68 seconds.",
    "Sexual violence affects people of every gender identity, age, and sexual orientation.",
    "Perpetrators of sexual misconduct often use the court system to punish survivors for speaking out about their abuse.",
    "Defamation lawsuits have become a weapon of choice for perpetrators seeking to intimidate and silence their accusers.",
    "Existing law provides limited protections for certain publications and speech related to complaints of sexual harassment.",
    "AB 933 will expand protections for speech made by survivors about their experiences related to sexual assault, harassment, or discrimination.",
    "AB 933 is designed to make it harder for perpetrators to retaliate against survivors with legal threats and intimidation.",
    "AB 933 provides reasonable attorneys' fees and damages to survivors who successfully defend against meritless defamation lawsuits.",
    "Retaliatory defamation lawsuits discourage survivors from coming forward due to the fear of expensive and drawn-out litigation.",
    "Claims made in good faith about experiences of sexual violence are considered a form of protected speech under AB 933."
  ]
}
```
